|trivia = 
* Hexoptics C44's codename in development was ''Snowbow''.<ref>[https://www.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/news/dev/dev-2026-season-one-gameplay-preview/ /dev: 2026 Season One Gameplay Preview]</ref>
* This item is a reference to {{cbis|Caitlyn}} rifle scope from the final battle in {{tip|Arcane}} Season 2.<ref>[https://xcancel.com/kindlejack/status/1995602600713216336 Kindlejack on X]: "Specifically referencing the scope on Caitlyn's final rifle in Arcane S2. I believe LoR marked the Darkin Bloodletters at Shuriman"</ref>

|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.04]]
* Magnification damage changed to {{pp|0 to 10 for 11|0 to 500|key=%|type=distance to target|formula=1% per 50 units away, up to a maximum of 10%.}} from {{pp|0 to 10 for 11|0 to 600|key=%|type=distance to target|showtype=false|formula=1% per 60 units away, up to a maximum of 10%.}}. ''Distance for maximum damage changed.''
* Arcane Aim duration increased to 8 seconds from 6.

;[[V26.02]]
* Attack damage increased to 55 from 50.
* Magnification damage changed to {{pp|0 to 10 for 11|0 to 600|key=%|type=distance to target|formula=1% per 60 units away, up to a maximum of 10%.}} from {{pp|0 to 10 for 11|0 to 700|key=%|type=distance to target|showtype=false|formula=1% per 70 units away, up to a maximum of 10%.}}. ''Distance for maximum damage changed.''

;[[V26.01]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Noonquiver}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|275}} = {{g|2800}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 50 attack damage, 25% critical strike chance.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Magnification:}} Deal {{pp|0 to 10 for 11|0 to 700|key=%|type=distance|formula=1% per 70 units away, up to a maximum of 10%.}} increased damage with basic attacks.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Arcane Aim:}} When a champion that you damaged within 3 seconds dies, gain 100 '''bonus''' attack range for 6 seconds.
* Limited to 1 '''Hexoptics C44'''.
}}
